description: AGENT-EUDR-024: Third-Party Audit Manager (TAM) -- end-to-end audit lifecycle management for EUDR compliance verification including risk-based audit scheduling, auditor qualification tracking (ISO/IEC 17065/17021-1), non-conformance detection and classification, corrective action request (CAR) lifecycle with SLA enforcement, certification scheme integration (FSC/PEFC/RSPO/RA/ISCC), ISO 19011 report generation, and competent authority liaison

panels.title: Active Audits
panels.description: Current number of active audits (not closed or cancelled) across all operators and certification schemes

panels.title: Open CARs by Severity
panels.description: Currently open corrective action requests broken down by severity (Critical/Major/Minor). Alert fires when critical CARs exceed 10.

panels.title: CAR SLA Compliance Rate
panels.description: Percentage of corrective action requests closed within their SLA deadline. Target: >= 85%. Alert fires below 80%.

panels.title: Cache Hit Ratio
panels.description: Redis cache hit ratio for audit data queries. Target: > 65%.

panels.title: Audits Created Over Time
panels.description: Rate of audit creation segmented by audit type (full, targeted, surveillance, unscheduled) and certification scheme

panels.title: Audits Completed Over Time
panels.description: Rate of audit completion segmented by outcome. Tracks closure velocity and completion trends.

panels.title: NCs Detected by Severity
panels.description: Non-conformances detected over time by severity level (critical/major/minor/observation). Alert: critical NCs > 5/hour triggers escalation.

alert.name: EUDR-TAM Critical NCs Rate
alert.message: Critical non-conformances exceed 5/hour threshold. Immediate review required for EUDR audit compliance.

panels.title: NCs by Country
panels.description: Non-conformance distribution by country of detection, highlighting geographic compliance patterns

panels.title: NCs Resolved Over Time
panels.description: Rate of non-conformance resolution by severity, showing compliance improvement velocity

panels.title: CARs Issued vs Closed
panels.description: Corrective action requests issued versus closed over time by severity, showing CAR lifecycle throughput

panels.title: CARs Overdue
panels.description: Rate of CARs exceeding SLA deadlines by severity. Alert fires when overdue CARs exceed 3/hour.

alert.name: EUDR-TAM CAR SLA Breach Rate
alert.message: CAR SLA breaches exceed 3/hour. Review overdue corrective action requests for escalation.

panels.title: CAR Escalations by Level
panels.description: CAR escalation events by escalation level (1=75% SLA, 2=90% SLA, 3=100% SLA, 4=30+ days overdue)

panels.title: Schedule Generation Latency
panels.description: Audit schedule generation latency distribution. Target: < 2 seconds for 500 suppliers.

panels.title: NC Classification Latency
panels.description: Non-conformance classification latency distribution. Target: < 500ms per finding.

panels.title: Report Generation Latency
panels.description: ISO 19011 audit report generation latency. Target: < 30 seconds per 50-finding PDF report.

panels.title: API Request Latency (p50/p95/p99)
panels.description: API request latency percentiles. Target: p95 < 200ms. Alert fires when p99 > 1 second.

alert.name: EUDR-TAM API p99 Latency
alert.message: API p99 latency exceeds 1 second. Investigate performance degradation.

panels.title: Scheme Sync Freshness
panels.description: Time since last synchronization with certification scheme databases (FSC, PEFC, RSPO, RA, ISCC). Target: < 24 hours.

panels.title: Reports Generated by Format
panels.description: Audit reports generated by output format (PDF, JSON, HTML, XLSX, XML) and language

panels.title: Authority Interactions by Type
panels.description: Competent authority interactions by type (document_request, inspection, enforcement) and EU Member State

alert.name: EUDR-TAM Auditor Capacity
alert.message: Authority interactions rate exceeds threshold. Verify auditor capacity and resource allocation.

panels.title: Certificate Expiry Monitoring
panels.description: Certification scheme sync freshness and certificate validity monitoring. Alert fires when sync exceeds 24 hours.

alert.name: EUDR-TAM Certificate Sync Expiry
alert.message: Certification scheme sync has not run in 24+ hours. Certificate status data may be stale.

panels.title: Audits by Certification Scheme
panels.description: Audit creation rate segmented by certification scheme (FSC, PEFC, RSPO, Rainforest Alliance, ISCC) showing cross-scheme activity distribution

panels.title: Report Generation by Language
panels.description: Audit report generation rate segmented by language (EN, FR, DE, ES, PT) showing multi-language utilization

panels.title: Authority Interactions by Member State
panels.description: Competent authority interactions by EU Member State, showing regulatory engagement distribution across the EU-27

panels.title: Compliance Rate Trend
panels.description: Percentage of audits with zero critical NCs and zero major NCs over time, showing compliance improvement trajectory. Tracks the key success metric: >= 85% CAR SLA compliance.

panels.title: Audits Cancelled Over Time
panels.description: Rate of audit cancellations by reason, tracking scheduling efficiency and resource utilization

panels.title: Alert Rules Reference
panels.description: Summary of all alert rules configured for the Third-Party Audit Manager agent

options.content:
## EUDR-024 Third-Party Audit Manager Alert Rules

| Alert | Condition | Severity | Evaluation |
|-------|-----------|----------|------------|
| **Critical NCs Rate** | Critical NCs > 5/hour | Critical | Every 1m, for 5m |
| **CAR SLA Breach Rate** | Overdue CARs > 3/hour | Warning | Every 1m, for 5m |
| **API p99 Latency** | p99 latency > 1 second | Warning | Every 1m, for 5m |
| **Auditor Capacity** | Authority interactions > 20/hour | Warning | Every 5m, for 10m |
| **Certificate Sync Expiry** | Sync freshness > 24 hours | Critical | Every 5m, for 15m |

### Notification Channels
- **Critical**: PagerDuty + Slack #eudr-critical
- **Warning**: Slack #eudr-alerts + Email on-call

### Runbook Links
- [Audit Lifecycle Management](https://runbooks.greenlang.io/eudr/tam/audit-lifecycle)
- [CAR SLA Breach Response](https://runbooks.greenlang.io/eudr/tam/car-sla-breach)
- [NC Classification Review](https://runbooks.greenlang.io/eudr/tam/nc-classification)
- [Certification Sync Recovery](https://runbooks.greenlang.io/eudr/tam/cert-sync-recovery)
- [Authority Interaction Response](https://runbooks.greenlang.io/eudr/tam/authority-response)
- [Performance Degradation](https://runbooks.greenlang.io/eudr/tam/perf-degradation)

list.description: Filter by certification scheme (FSC, PEFC, RSPO, RA, ISCC)
list.label: Scheme
list.name: scheme

list.description: Filter by country of audit (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2)
list.label: Country
list.name: country

title: EUDR Third-Party Audit Manager (TAM)
